ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Name of the image file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image file in bytes */,
  "file_attributes" TEXT /* Attributes related to the image file, stored as JSON */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the image file (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the image file */,
  "region_count" INTEGER /* Count of regions in the image */,
  "region_shape_attributes" TEXT /* Attributes defining the shape of the region, stored as JSON */,
  "region_attributes" TEXT /* Additional attributes related to the region, stored as JSON */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, contributor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the annotated region */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the image */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original image file */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the image */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when this version was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_versions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image associated with the category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., nature, urban, abstract) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_categories_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., sunset, mountain) */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, contributor) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role, stored as JSON */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image that was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the change was made */,
  "audit_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the change, stored as JSON */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_audits_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_audits_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_shapes" (
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shape */,
  "shape_name" TEXT /* Name of the shape (e.g., rectangle, circle, polygon) */,
  "shape_description" TEXT /* Description of the shape */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_shape_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape associated with the attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., x, y, width, height) */,
  "attribute_description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_shape_attributes_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES region_shapes ("shape_id")
)
